subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! From the pen name of that prince of poets, the meaning of humility and submissiveness was inferred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء از تخلص آن سرور شعراء معنی خضوع و خشوع استنباط گشت
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @poems and quotation from poetry
